content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 2.1 WARN — App is login-gated (App/LoginView.swift:1) with credentials provided (demo_user.txt, demo_password.txt), but notes.txt contains only "n/a" with no explanation of how to reach the paywall/subscription features.
Pierre: Apple reviewers need explicit guidance on reaching gated functionality like the subscription paywall (PaywallView.swift) and app-blocking features; credentials alone aren't enough since the reviewer won't know how to trigger or test premium features without purchasing. Replace "n/a" with concrete steps (e.g., "Sign in with provided credentials, then tap Premium tab to see paywall; use sandbox account to test subscription flow"). This is a quick fix but likely to cause a rejection or review delay if left as-is.
